faq_patterns.description: PowerVS FAQ patterns extracted from existing faq.md file

pattern.name: Conceptual "What is" FAQ
pattern.answer_structure: Definition sentence. Additional context about why this matters. For more information, see [Link to related documentation](url).

pattern.name: Comparison FAQ
pattern.question_template: What is the difference between [Option A] and [Option B]?

pattern.name: Procedure FAQ
pattern.answer_structure:
To [accomplish task], complete these steps: 1. Step one 2. Step two 3. Step three
For more detailed information, see [Link to full guide](url).

pattern.name: Capability FAQ
pattern.answer_structure: Yes/No. [Explanation]. For more information, see [reference](url). [Optional: Add conditions or prerequisites]

pattern.name: Technical Specification FAQ

naming_conventions.anchor_rule: Use descriptive names reflecting question content

deployment_tagging.rule: If BOTH deployments: Include both tags with separate sections
If deployment-agnostic: No deployment tag needed
